definition_en: (bound form) ten-day period; one of the three ten-day divisions of a month (e.g. 上旬[shang4 xun2]); (bound form) ten years (in age expressions, e.g. 六旬[liu4 xun2] "sixty years old")
example_words: 上旬 (shàng xún); 下旬 (xià xún); 中旬 (zhōng xún)

definition_en: Li (c. 2000 BC), sixth of the legendary Flame Emperors 炎帝[Yan2 di4] descended from Shennong 神農|神农[Shen2 nong2] Farmer God, also known as Ai 哀[Ai1]
example_words: 公厘 (gōng lí); 厘克 (lí kè); 厘升 (lí shēng)

definition_en: surname Lu; Luzhou or Lu Prefecture 廬州|庐州[Lu2 Zhou1], a prefecture between the 6th and 13th centuries in present-day Anhui; Mount Lu 廬山|庐山[Lu2 Shan1] in Jiangxi Province
example_words: 穹庐 (qióng lú); 结庐 (jié lú); 茅庐 (máo lú)

definition_en: (bound form) last day of a lunar month; (bound form) dark; gloomy; (literary) night
example_words: 悖晦 (bèi huì); 显晦 (xiǎn huì); 晦暗 (huì àn)

definition_en: 12th earthly branch: 9-11 p.m., 10th solar month (7th November-6th December), year of the Boar; ancient Chinese compass point: 330°
example_words: 丁亥 (dīng hài); 乙亥 (yǐ hài); 亥猪 (hài zhū)

definition_en: (bound form) daybreak; dawn; Taiwan pr. [shu4]
example_words: 曙光 (shǔ guāng); 曙色 (shǔ sè); 曙红朱雀 (shǔ hóng zhū què)

definition_en: to winnow; to toss up and down
example_words: 簸扬 (bǒ yáng); 簸箕 (bò jī); 簸荡 (bǒ dàng)

definition_en: to boil; to brew (tea); to cook by briefly stir-frying and then mixing in sauce; (old) to boil to death (judicial punishment in ancient times)
example_words: 烹制 (pēng zhì); 烹煮 (pēng zhǔ); 烹茶 (pēng chá)

definition_en: intercalary; an extra day or month inserted into the lunar or solar calendar (such as February 29)
example_words: 敖闰 (áo rùn); 闰年 (rùn nián); 闰月 (rùn yuè)

definition_en: winnow basket
example_words: 扶箕 (fú jī); 畚箕 (běn jī); 筲箕 (shāo jī)
